form.formComment: Solid performance when a close second behind Wicked Confession at Birchip over 2150m in a 4yo+ NR up to 90 on March 8 at $7. Then a handy effort when beaten by 4 m finishing third after being driven well back, behind Coastal Drive at this track over 1609m in a 4-020yo+ 0W/20K Stakes on March 27 at $6. Rates highly. Strong chance aided by a lower draw.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 7th (Fr7) over 2270m after being wide early at Riverina Paceway beaten 10 m by Seasider (2:40.20) in 4-5yo LR No NR GH on April 4 at $15. Draws wide but he is good enough to win with even luck.
